name: The Poisoned Well
description: Elara believes the water supply is being poisoned. Someone is killing Ashvale slowly, and they don't want to be found.

ACTIVE.journal_entry: Elara found nightcap root in the well water — a deliberate poison. I agreed to investigate the upstream water source in Thornwood with her.
objectives: Meet Elara at the eastern edge of the village at dawn
Travel to the water source in Thornwood

EVIDENCE_FOUND.journal_entry: We found a hidden cache of nightcap root near the water source, along with a torn cloth bearing a symbol. Three suspects emerge.
objectives: Investigate Brother Maren (Church of Ashen Light symbol?)

ACCUSED_MAREN.journal_entry: I accused Brother Maren of poisoning the water. He denies everything, but the evidence is circumstantial at best. Was I right?

ACCUSED_FENRICK.journal_entry: I accused the Guild of poisoning Ashvale as part of their power play. Fenrick's reaction was... complicated.

ACCUSED_LORD.journal_entry: I accused Lord Ashworth himself of poisoning his own people. The lord's secret is darker than anyone imagined.

TRUTH_REVEALED.journal_entry: The truth behind the poisoning is revealed. Nothing in Ashvale is what it seems.

DEAD_END.journal_entry: The water source seems clean. The poison must be introduced closer to the village. More investigation needed.

FAILED_ELARA_DEAD.journal_entry: Elara is dead. The investigation dies with her — unless I continue alone. But who killed her, and why?
